{{Quote|Yavin. Krylon. Torque. A ''jillion'' more. Rumor has it Tagge is on to a big ''spice strike'' on one of 'em.|Jorman Thoad|<ref name="sw25">[[Star Wars (1977) 25|''Star Wars'' (1977) 25]]</ref>}}
'''Torque''' ("'''Torqua-na'''" in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]]) was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Torque system/Legends|Torque system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] capital of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]].<ref name="Atlas" /> A lackluster [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]], it was the headquarters of [[Bwahl]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

The planet served as an important commercial hub in the Gordian Reach, while its cities were known as one of the most busiest [[spaceport]]s on the [[Junction-Tierell Loop]] hyperlane. Nevertheless most of its cities lacked the glitterness of other sector world capitals.
